name: Iomete
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the IOMETE lakehouse and basic metadata extraction of schemas and tables.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the IOMETE service and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to IOMETE. Please validate the host/port, username, password, cluster, and data plane.

steps.name: GetSchemas
steps.description: List all the schemas available to the user.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch schemas. Please validate that the user has sufficient privileges.

steps.name: GetTables
steps.description: From a given schema, list the tables belonging to that schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch tables. Please validate that the user has sufficient privileges.

steps.name: GetViews
steps.description: From a given schema, list the views belonging to that schema.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch views. Please validate that the user has sufficient privileges.
